segments.original_text: Indha video la nama paaka porathu introduction to Python language. Adhavadhu Python language na enna, history of Python language and edhukkaga Python padikkanum angaradha paakalam.
segments.english_text: In this video, what we are going to see is the introduction to Python language. That is, what is Python language, history of Python language, and why we should learn Python, let's see that.
segments.text: In this video, what we are going to see is the introduction to Python language. That is, what is Python language, history of Python language, and why we should learn Python, let's see that.

segments.original_text: Indha video voda end la ungalukkana tips sollirukken. So video va kadaisi varaikum skip pannama paaringa. Vaanga video kulla polam.
segments.english_text: At the end of this video, I have given tips for you. So watch the video till the end without skipping. Let's go into the video.

segments.original_text: Python oru programming language.
segments.english_text: Python is a programming language.
segments.text: Python is a programming language.

segments.original_text: Indha language ah interpreted, interactive and object-oriented language nu solluvanga.
segments.english_text: This language is called interpreted, interactive and object-oriented language.
segments.text: This language is called interpreted, interactive and object-oriented language.

segments.original_text: Yen Python language ah interpreter nu sollrom nu paatheengana, Python language interpreter use panni dhaan programs ah run pannum.
segments.english_text: If you ask why we call Python language interpreted, it's because Python language runs programs using an interpreter.
segments.text: If you ask why we call Python language interpreted, it's because Python language runs programs using an interpreter.

segments.original_text: Appo interpreter na enna?
segments.english_text: So what is an interpreter?
segments.text: So what is an interpreter?

segments.original_text: Adhu oru translator.
segments.english_text: It is a translator.
segments.text: It is a translator.

segments.original_text: Oru programmer kudukka koodiya Python coding ah computer la irukka Python interpreter line by line ah computer ku puriyura machine language ah convert pannum.
segments.english_text: A Python interpreter in the computer will convert the Python coding given by a programmer, line by line, into machine language that the computer understands.
segments.text: A Python interpreter in the computer will convert the Python coding given by a programmer, line by line, into machine language that the computer understands.

segments.original_text: Adhanala dhaan Python language ah nama interpreted language nu sollrom.
segments.english_text: That's why we call Python language an interpreted language.
segments.text: That's why we call Python language an interpreted language.

segments.original_text: Next interactive.
segments.english_text: Next, interactive.
segments.text: Next, interactive.

segments.original_text: Appadina rendu per communicate panra maari.
segments.english_text: That means like two people communicating.
segments.text: That means like two people communicating.

segments.original_text: Adhavadhu neenga Python coding ah podum bodhu neenga kudukura oru oru line of coding kum output appavey kidaikkum.
segments.english_text: That is, when you write Python coding, you will get the output for each line of coding you provide immediately.
segments.text: That is, when you write Python coding, you will get the output for each line of coding you provide immediately.

segments.original_text: Just questions ku answer panra maari.
segments.english_text: Just like answering questions.
segments.text: Just like answering questions.

segments.original_text: And also IDE use panneengana at a time la neenga editor and output screen rendulayumey work pannalam.
segments.english_text: And also, if you use an IDE, you can work on both the editor and output screen at the same time.
segments.text: And also, if you use an IDE, you can work on both the editor and output screen at the same time.

segments.original_text: Next Python object-oriented programming concepts like polymorphism, inheritance, encapsulation, objects, classes, abstraction support pannum.
segments.english_text: Next, Python supports object-oriented programming concepts like polymorphism, inheritance, encapsulation, objects, classes, abstraction.
segments.text: Next, Python supports object-oriented programming concepts like polymorphism, inheritance, encapsulation, objects, classes, abstraction.

segments.original_text: Adhanala dhaan Python language ah object-oriented programming nu sollrom.
segments.english_text: That's why we call Python language object-oriented programming.
segments.text: That's why we call Python language object-oriented programming.

segments.original_text: Also Python ah general purpose language nu solluvanga.
segments.english_text: Also, Python is called a general-purpose language.
segments.text: Also, Python is called a general-purpose language.

segments.original_text: Yenna Python ah nama endha field la venalum use pannalam. Adhavadhu different types of softwares develop pannalam like web application, mobile application, gaming, etc.
segments.english_text: Because we can use Python in any field. That is, we can develop different types of software like web application, mobile application, gaming, etc.
segments.text: Because we can use Python in any field. That is, we can develop different types of software like web application, mobile application, gaming, etc.

segments.original_text: Python multiple programming features kum support pannum. Like procedural language, object-oriented programming and functional programming um support pannum.
segments.english_text: Python also supports multiple programming features. Like procedural language, object-oriented programming and functional programming are also supported.
segments.text: Python also supports multiple programming features. Like procedural language, object-oriented programming and functional programming are also supported.

segments.original_text: Next Python oda history paakalam.
segments.english_text: Next, let's look at Python's history.
segments.text: Next, let's look at Python's history.

segments.original_text: Netherlands ah serndha Dutch computer programmer Mr. Guido van Rossum 1989 la Centrum Wiskunde & Informatica ngra oru company la work pannitu irundharu.
segments.english_text: Mr. Guido van Rossum, a Dutch computer programmer from the Netherlands, was working at a company called Centrum Wiskunde & Informatica in 1989.
segments.text: Mr. Guido van Rossum, a Dutch computer programmer from the Netherlands, was working at a company called Centrum Wiskunde & Informatica in 1989.

segments.original_text: Appa avar work panna project ABC programming language ah develop panradhu. Successfully develop um pannitanga.
segments.english_text: Then, the project he was working on was to develop the ABC programming language. They successfully developed it.
segments.text: Then, the project he was working on was to develop the ABC programming language. They successfully developed it.

segments.original_text: But andha language la neraya drawbacks irundhanala avara oru language develop pannanum nu yocharu.
segments.english_text: But because that language had many drawbacks, he thought of developing a new language.
segments.text: But because that language had many drawbacks, he thought of developing a new language.

segments.original_text: Appo 1989 la avaroda Christmas holidays la oru pudhu programming language ah develop pannaru.
segments.english_text: Then, in 1989, during his Christmas holidays, he developed a new programming language.
segments.text: Then, in 1989, during his Christmas holidays, he developed a new programming language.

segments.original_text: Adhula ABC language oda best features aiyum include pannaru.
segments.english_text: In that, he also included the best features of the ABC language.
segments.text: In that, he also included the best features of the ABC language.

segments.original_text: And language develop panna appuram adhukku name vekkanum nu yochappo Python nu name vecharu.
segments.english_text: And after developing the language, when he thought of naming it, he named it Python.
segments.text: And after developing the language, when he thought of naming it, he named it Python.

segments.original_text: Andha name avarukku eppadi thonuchu na 1970s la oru famous comedy series BBC channel la telecast pannitu irundhanga.
segments.english_text: How that name occurred to him was that in the 1970s, a famous comedy series was being telecast on the BBC channel.
segments.text: How that name occurred to him was that in the 1970s, a famous comedy series was being telecast on the BBC channel.

segments.original_text: Adhoda name Monty Python's Flying Circus.
segments.english_text: Its name was Monty Python's Flying Circus.
segments.text: Its name was Monty Python's Flying Circus.

segments.original_text: Namma Guido van Rossum andha show voda periya fan.
segments.english_text: Our Guido van Rossum was a big fan of that show.
segments.text: Our Guido van Rossum was a big fan of that show.

segments.original_text: So avar develop panna language ku name vekkanum nu yochappo, unique ah, short ah, adhe samayam konjam mysterious ah irukkanum nu yochichu Python ngra name ah vecharu.
segments.english_text: So when he thought of naming the language he developed, he wanted it to be unique, short, and at the same time a bit mysterious, so he chose the name Python.
segments.text: So when he thought of naming the language he developed, he wanted it to be unique, short, and at the same time a bit mysterious, so he chose the name Python.

segments.original_text: Sariya one year kalichu 1991 la Guido van Rossum Python language oda official version 0.9.0 va release pannaru. Adhukku appuram 1994 la Python 1.0 version innum sila new features oda release pannanga.
segments.english_text: Exactly one year later, in 1991, Guido van Rossum released the official version 0.9.0 of the Python language. After that, in 1994, Python 1.0 version was released with some new features.
segments.text: Exactly one year later, in 1991, Guido van Rossum released the official version 0.9.0 of the Python language. After that, in 1994, Python 1.0 version was released with some new features.

segments.original_text: On to October 2000 la Python 2.0 version list comprehension, garbage collection, Unicode support panra maari language release pannanga.
segments.english_text: Then in October 2000, Python 2.0 version was released with features like list comprehension, garbage collection, and Unicode support.
segments.text: Then in October 2000, Python 2.0 version was released with features like list comprehension, garbage collection, and Unicode support.

segments.original_text: Then December 3, 2008 la Python 3.0 version release pannanga.
segments.english_text: Then on December 3, 2008, Python 3.0 version was released.
segments.text: Then on December 3, 2008, Python 3.0 version was released.

segments.original_text: Python 3.0 version ah Python 3K or Python 3000 nu sollalam.
segments.english_text: Python 3.0 version can be called Python 3K or Python 3000.
segments.text: Python 3.0 version can be called Python 3K or Python 3000.

segments.original_text: Next idhukkaga nama Python language ah padikkanum nu paakalam.
segments.english_text: Next, let's see why we should learn Python language.
segments.text: Next, let's see why we should learn Python language.

segments.original_text: Python matha languages maari illama kathukaradhu rombavey easyana language.
segments.english_text: Unlike other languages, Python is a very easy language to learn.
segments.text: Unlike other languages, Python is a very easy language to learn.

segments.original_text: Adhoda syntax rombavey simple ah design pannirukkaradunala oru programmer beginner ah kathukaradhu romba easy.
segments.english_text: Because its syntax is designed very simply, it's very easy for a programmer beginner to learn.
segments.text: Because its syntax is designed very simply, it's very easy for a programmer beginner to learn.

segments.original_text: Python la complexana data types ellam kidaiyadhu.
segments.english_text: In Python, there are no complex data types.
segments.text: In Python, there are no complex data types.

segments.original_text: And nama use panra data automatically adhukkana type ku convert aagara maari design pannirukkanga.
segments.english_text: And the data we use is designed to automatically convert to its respective type.
segments.text: And the data we use is designed to automatically convert to its respective type.

segments.original_text: Adhanala dhaan indha language ah dynamically typed language nu sollranga.
segments.english_text: That's why this language is called a dynamically typed language.
segments.text: That's why this language is called a dynamically typed language.

segments.original_text: Idhu mattum illama innum neraya features Python language la available ah irukku.
segments.english_text: Not only this, but many more features are available in Python language.
segments.text: Not only this, but many more features are available in Python language.

segments.english_text: First one, easy to learn and use.

segments.original_text: Python oru high-level language adhavadhu English like language ah irukkaradunala kathukaradhu and use panradhu easy.
segments.english_text: Python is a high-level language, meaning it's an English-like language, so it's easy to learn and use.
segments.text: Python is a high-level language, meaning it's an English-like language, so it's easy to learn and use.

segments.original_text: Also indha language developer friendly ah irukkum because neraya built-in libraries and functions available ah irukkaradunala.

segments.text: Also, this language will be developer-friendly because many built-in libraries and functions are available.

segments.english_text: That is, you can run Python programs on any operating system.
